package rulefixtures

// scenario for filter_then_count_then_iterate: Same collection traversed multiple times for filter, count, and process steps.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule350PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario350Positive(records []Rule350PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
